en-US.name: Meaning of Life
en-US.summary: Find out the true meaning of life.
en-US.description: A simple skill that reveals the true meaning of life. Just ask Alexa: 'What is the meaning of life?' and discover the answer that philosophers have overlooked for centuries.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask meaning of life what is the meaning of life
Alexa, ask meaning of life what's the meaning of life

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Open the skill and ask 'what is the meaning of life'.
